chapter_title: Testing & Inspection of Motor Vehicles by Certain Municipalities
text:
(a) This chapter applies only to a municipality with a population of more than 290,000.

(b) This section or an ordinance adopted under this section does not apply to a motor vehicle, trailer, or semitrailer operated under a registration certificate issued under Chapter 643 (Motor Carrier Registration) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 726. Testing & Inspection of Motor Vehicles by Certain Municipalities
##### § 726.001 — Applicability

(a) This chapter applies only to a municipality with a population of more than 290,000.

(b) This section or an ordinance adopted under this section does not apply to a motor vehicle, trailer, or semitrailer operated under a registration certificate issued under Chapter 643 (Motor Carrier Registration) .

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.166, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: This chapter applies only to a municipality with a population of more than 290,000.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: This section or an ordinance adopted under this section does not apply to a motor vehicle, trailer, or semitrailer operated under a registration certificate issued under Chapter 643 (Motor Carrier Registration) .
